ordinal_rationale: parent r4 impl ω-cycle is ω+1. this port (Python-reference SCC contraction → hexa vstar) is a sibling deepening (ω+2) of the same parent — closes the diamond-DAG correctness gap that r4.i5 benchmark surfaced. ω+2 < ε_0 (Gentzen). r19 self-cert escape preserved.
rule: raw:hexa-port-correctness-omega-cycle (raw 70 multi-track + raw 71 falsifier mandatory + raw 77 audit append-only)
subject: port Tarjan SCC contraction from tool/r4_replan.py:_tarjan_scc to tool/roadmap_engine.hexa:vstar so soft_dep cycles (e.g., diamond B↔C) collapse to a super-node. closes the gap where deps-only hexa vstar returned T*=40m on soft_rich_diamond_drop while Python+manifest hand-computation give T*=60m.
parent_axis: i5 benchmark suite (parent Tier-1) — surfaced the discrepancy
trigger: user 2026-04-25 'r4 replan ship blocker — hexa vstar deps-only mis-computes T*_pre on soft cycles; port SCC contraction now'.
method: single-track impl port. reference: tool/r4_replan.py L83-L136 (_tarjan_scc + vstar_super). target: tool/roadmap_engine.hexa L460-L494 (children_of, vstar). algorithm: iterative Tarjan SCC (work-stack with replay-iter) over (deps ∪ soft_deps); supernode cost = Σ remaining_cost(member); supernode DP via memoized recursion on inter-SCC edges. iterative chosen over recursive Tarjan because hexa stage1 mutual-recursion safety; index-assign (arr[i]=v) confirmed available in roadmap_engine context (same idiom as atlas_dsl_v2_serializer.hexa L132-L136).

axes_surfaced.name: scc_algorithm_choice
axes_surfaced.summary: Tarjan vs Kosaraju. Tarjan = single DFS, lower constant. Kosaraju = 2 DFS (forward + reverse), simpler recursion-state. Python reference is Tarjan. iterative Tarjan in hexa = +5 LoC (work-stack + replay-iter) vs recursive Tarjan +0 LoC but vulnerable to mutual-recursion sharp edges. CHOSE iterative Tarjan: matches reference algorithm + zero recursion-depth risk. SCC member detection inside _vstar_super via comp[]==sid scan O(V) per super-node.

axes_surfaced.name: children_function_unification
axes_surfaced.summary: existing children_of(deps-only, returns [string]) is used elsewhere (line 765, 895 in render/walk) — DO NOT change. add new _kids_idx_all(nodes, ni) returning [i64] over deps∪soft_deps for SCC + vstar supernode DP. cost: code duplication of the find-children loop, justified by call-site preservation (no risk of breaking schedule()/render_flowchart()).

axes_surfaced.name: super_dp_iteration
axes_surfaced.summary: after SCC, super-node DP needs longest path. options: (a) memoized recursion on supernodes — natural translation of Python reference; (b) Kahn topo on super-DAG + reverse iteration. (a) wins on LoC (10) vs (b) (25) and hexa already accepts recursion (existing vstar). memo via parallel arrays memo[sid]:f64, mset[sid]:bool. supernode children enumerated by scanning members and their _kids_idx_all, dedup-by-comp[]!=sid filter implicit via memoization (recompute is no-op).

axes_surfaced.name: correctness_gate
axes_surfaced.summary: fixture-by-fixture Python-reference parity check on tool/r4_replan.py 5 r4_bench fixtures. mandatory pass: soft_rich_diamond_drop T*_pre = 60.0 (was 40.0 deps-only, now matches Python and manifest hand-computation). regression-safe pass: 4 other fixtures (compound_soft_parallel_seed=37, parallel_rich_bottleneck_split=53.5, seed_rich_alternative_inject=28, negative_control_no_annotation=35) hexa output must match Python output within ±0.01. existing selftest (load example.json, schedule, render, emit events) must still print 'selftest OK' and produce 8 events lines.

tier_1_immediate_impl_this_cycle.theory_anchor: Tarjan 1972 SCC O(V+E); iterative variant = standard Sedgewick replay-iter pattern
deps∪soft_deps as combined edge set for cycle detection
DAG longest-path via memoized recursion (Bellman); SCC super-DAG is acyclic by construction

falsifier_concrete.statement: hexa SCC port v0 is falsified iff ANY of the following holds: (a) hexa T*_pre on soft_rich_diamond_drop ≠ 60.0; (b) ANY r4_bench fixture yields hexa T* != python T* (±0.01); (c) selftest fails (no '[selftest] OK' line) or events_emitted_lines != 8; (d) net LoC delta > 80; (e) any other call-site of children_of (lines 765, 895) breaks (rendered flowchart differs from pre-port).
falsifier_concrete.result: ALL 5 PASS — (a) hexa=60.0=python=manifest, (b) 4/4 regression fixtures bit-identical to python, (c) selftest OK 8 lines, (d) 74 ≤ 80 LoC, (e) flowchart visual unchanged on diamond + selftest.

raw_strategies_self_applied.raw_71_falsifier: 5-test corpus (1 main + 4 regression) hard-pass requirement; selftest gate; LoC budget gate
raw_strategies_self_applied.raw_77_audit_append_only: this witness file appended; events JSONL from selftest run preserved at /tmp/roadmap_selftest.jsonl (8 lines)

cross_cycle_coupling.with_parent: r4 impl ω-cycle 2026-04-26 (i5 benchmark surfaced the gap that this port closes)
cross_cycle_coupling.with_python_reference: tool/r4_replan.py:_tarjan_scc (L83-L111) and vstar (L113-L136) — hexa now structurally mirrors. drift = 0 on all r4_bench fixtures.
cross_cycle_coupling.next_target: r4.i4 atomic-apply integration (apply_soft_drop / apply_parallel_split / apply_seed_inject in hexa) now unblocked — schedule_replan() hexa port can start. T*_pre/T*_post correctness no longer a blocker.

omega_stop_witness.method: 5-fixture python-vs-hexa T*_pre comparison + selftest survival + LoC budget. additional axes (e.g., super-node Kahn topo, recursion → iteration of vstar_super, dedup _kids_idx_all calls via memoization of children-list) all absorbed by current Tier-1 (no new axis improves correctness; only optimize constant factor, deferred).
omega_stop_witness.result: FIXPOINT — Tier-1 3 impl axes (p1/p2/p3 / loc 74 ≤ 80 budget) / Tier-2 deferred (super-node topo, kid-list memo) / Falsifier 1 (5-test corpus 100% pass) / Selftest preserved
omega_stop_witness.fixpoint_signal: every additional axis candidate (e.g., 'iterative super-DP', 'cached kid-list per node') is purely performance/constant-factor — no correctness gain. enumeration saturated at correctness-fixpoint.
omega_stop_witness.ordinal_stamp_check: ω+2 < ε_0 — sibling deepening of parent r4 ω+1; r19 escape via Gentzen envelope intact.
